title: ILJAOC via Brea PD (CA) - PSDEX/AVCC Contributions and Data Sharing

communications.subject: California Public Records Act Request: ILJAOC via Brea PD (CA) - PSDEX/AVCC Contributions and Data Sharing
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the California Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

1) Foundational Documents: The Accurint Virtual Crime Center 'AVCC XML Addendum' or 'PSDEX Addendum' executed by ILJAOC, including all sub-agency addendums executed by member agencies.

2) Who Contributes: Any documentation, configurations, or records that indicate whether ILJAOC members contribute data to PSDEX/AVCC (Public Safety Data Exchange / Accurint Virtual Crime Center).

3) Who Can Access Agency Data: Any documentation, configurations, or records that indicate what agencies may access contributed data. Specifically, we seek to understand whether ILJAOC members who contribute data to PSDEX/AVCC restrict data access to only ILJAOC members, or if agency data flows into the national PSDEX database available to other AVCC customers.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Shawn Segal

title: Miami Township (OH) AVCC/PSDEX Data Contribution Agreements and Consortium Details

communications.subject: Ohio Open Records Law Request: Miami Township (OH) AVCC/PSDEX Data Contribution Agreements and Consortium Details
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Ohio Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

1. The executed agreement, MOU, or contract between Miami Township and LexisNexis Risk Solutions FL Inc. for the Accurint Virtual Crime Center (AVCC), including all addenda, exhibits, and schedules.

2. Any 'AVCC XML Addendum,' 'PSDEX Addendum,' or data contribution agreement executed by Miami Township as Lead Agency for the MVCC Tactical Crime Suppression Unit AVCC consortium.

3. Any sub-agency agreements, joinder agreements, or authorization letters executed by participating member agencies (Centerville, Germantown, Kettering, Miamisburg, Moraine, Springboro, West Carrollton) to access AVCC through Miami Township's contract.

4. The current full list of agencies participating in the MVCC AVCC consortium.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Shawn Segal

communications.subject: Colorado Open Records Act Request: Denver PD - AVCC/PSDEX Data Sharing
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Colorado Open Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

1) The executed 'Accurint Virtual Crime Center / Accurint Crime Analysis / LexisNexis Community Crime Map / AVCC XML / Lumen CISC Member Agency Addendum and Joinder' signed by the Denver Police Department, including all signature pages and any initialed provisions.

2) Any configuration page, document, or other record that states what agencies may view Denver PD's contributed data within PSDEX/AVCC. Specifically we are seeking to understand if Denver PD is sharing data only with CISC members, or has opted to share data beyond the CISC group. Please provide any records that identify with what agencies Denver PD shares its data with via PSDEX/AVCC.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Shawn Segal
